functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher records a grade for a student in a course. Validates student existence, course existence, score range (0-100), and no duplicate grade for the same student-course pair.

functional_requirements.title: Update Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher updates an existing grade record. Validates grade record existence and updates score and recorded_at timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher deletes a grade record. Validates grade record existence and removes it.

functional_requirements.title: Get Student Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a student, compute average score, total credits, and GPA. Display grades with course name, score, and letter grade.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a course, compute average, max, min scores, and distribution of letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: List Grades by Class
functional_requirements.description: List grades for students in a specific class, optionally filtered by course. Compute class average and rank students by score.

functional_requirements.title: Get Grade Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate a textual report for a student including all subject grades, average, GPA, and credit summary.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Statistics
functional_requirements.description: Compute statistics for a course: average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade distribution percentages.

functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student to the system. Validates that student_id is unique.

functional_requirements.title: Add Course
functional_requirements.description: Add a new course to the system. Validates that course_id is unique.

non_functional_requirements.description: The system should provide clear error messages for invalid operations (e.g., duplicate grade, non-existent student).
Data integrity must be maintained: no duplicate grades for same student-course, valid score range.

acceptance_criteria.description: Record grade: valid input creates grade record with correct grade_id and letter grade.
Record grade: duplicate student-course returns error with existing grade_id.
Update grade: valid update changes score and returns new letter grade.
Delete grade: valid deletion removes record and returns success.
Get student grades: returns correct average, total credits, GPA, and grade details.
Get course grades: returns correct average, max, min, and distribution.
List grades by class: returns students with scores and ranks, class average correct.
Get grade report: generates text report with all required fields.
Get course statistics: computes average, std_dev, pass_rate, grade distribution correctly.
Add student: new student added successfully, duplicate student_id rejected.
Add course: new course added successfully, duplicate course_id rejected.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: students, courses, grades.

glossary.GPA: Grade Point Average, calculated as weighted average of grade points (A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0) multiplied by course credits.
glossary.Standard Deviation: Measure of score dispersion from the mean.

global_state_sources.description: Stores student information keyed by student_id.
Stores course information keyed by course_id.
Stores grade records keyed by grade_id. Also maintains a set of (student_id, course_id) pairs to enforce uniqueness.

input_spec.description: Input is provided via the function manage_grade(command, grade_data) where command is a string and grade_data is a JSON object.

schema.command: string (one of: record_grade, update_grade, delete_grade, get_student_grades, get_course_grades, list_class_grades, get_grade_report, get_course_stats, add_student, add_course)

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success flag, message, and data payload.

examples.message: 该学生此课程已有成绩记录
